summary: Drop mview triggers before setup:upgrade to prevent 'already exists' errors

changes.description: Before each setup:upgrade attempt, drop all auto-generated mview triggers (trg_*). Magento's recurring schema scripts rebuild these on every run, but sometimes fail to DROP before CREATE when trigger bodies change (e.g. new module adds mview subscriptions), producing error 1359 'Trigger already exists'. Pre-emptive drop is safe because triggers are always recreated and cron/storefront writes are disabled during deploy.
